auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in with your social account
auth.signInFailedMessage:
An error occurred during Google sign-in. Please try again shortly.

{{error}}

home.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

debug.resetPasskeyMessage: Deletes only the local passkey (wallet & recovery accounts are kept). Try to send, or tap Re-register Passkey, to start the re-registration (4) flow.
debug.resetBothMessage: Deletes the local passkey and recovery accounts and signs you out. On sign-in, tap 'Recover your wallet' (not Google sign-in) and re-enter your recovery accounts to start recovery (5).

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please review and agree to continue

create.title: Create wallet
create.subtitle: Register this device as your wallet key
create.infoBullet3: Next, you'll fund with test ETH and deploy your wallet

passkey.title: Create Passkey
passkey.subtitle: Secure your account with biometrics
passkey.description: Your passkey uses Face ID or fingerprint to protect your wallet
passkey.resetSubtitle: Create a new passkey for your account
passkey.recoveryAccountsHint: You will be asked to sign in with the following accounts
passkey.infoBullet1: A passkey replaces passwords with biometrics like Face ID or fingerprint
passkey.infoBullet2: Your passkey is stored securely on your device and never shared
passkey.infoBullet3: You'll use this to approve transactions and recover your account
passkey.pleaseCreateNew: Your passkey could not be found. Please create a new one.

wallet.title: Protect Your Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Set up recovery accounts
wallet.description: Register social accounts to recover your wallet if you lose access
wallet.removeAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this recovery account?
wallet.recoveryNote: To recover your wallet, you must log in with the same accounts in the same order
wallet.skipRecoveryDescription: Protect your wallet with your default social account only

done.title: You're All Set!
done.subtitle: Your wallet is ready to use

send.title: Send
send.walletNotDeployed: Wallet not deployed. Please fund your wallet first.
send.passkeyNotFoundMessage: This device does not have the passkey needed to approve transfers. Verify with your recovery accounts, then register a new passkey.
send.passkeyMismatchMessage: The on-chain passkey doesn't match this device. Please register your passkey again.
send.exceedsBalance: You can't send more than your balance
send.insufficientBalanceMessage: The amount plus the network fee (gas) exceeds your balance. Lower the amount or add more ETH, then try again.
send.gasEstimationFailedMessage: Couldn't prepare the transaction. Please try again in a moment.
send.failedMessage: Something went wrong while sending. Please try again in a moment.
send.successMessage: Your transaction has been submitted to Base Sepolia.

review.title: Update recovery accounts
review.warn: Applying requires signing in with all current recovery accounts to verify it's you, and it costs gas.

gasGate.title: Not enough gas
gasGate.body: This action needs a network fee (gas). Deposit Base Sepolia ETH to the wallet address below and try again.

status.title: Recovery
status.subtitle: Manage your recovery accounts
status.configuredDescription: Your wallet can be recovered using your linked social accounts
status.notConfiguredDescription: Set up recovery accounts to protect your wallet
status.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your recovery configuration? You will need to set it up again to recover your wallet.
status.infoNote: Recovery requires verification from all registered social accounts. Make sure you have access to these accounts.

setup.title: Recovery Account Setup
setup.description: Manage social accounts used for wallet recovery
setup.signaturePending:
Recovery account changes are prepared.
Signature feature will be available in a future update.
setup.subtitle: Configure your recovery accounts
setup.discardMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to go back?
setup.socialLoginUnsupportedMessage: Social login is not supported on web.
setup.alreadyAddedMessage: This provider is already linked. Please choose a different one.
setup.saveSuccess: Recovery accounts have been configured successfully.
setup.saveFailed: Failed to save recovery configuration. Please try again.
setup.walletNotFound: No wallet found for this network. Please activate the wallet first.
setup.linkFailed: Failed to link account. Please try again.
setup.infoNote: Recovery accounts are used to verify your identity when recovering your wallet. All registered accounts will be required.
setup.proofTimeout: Proof generation timed out. Please try again.
setup.accountMismatchMessage: Please sign in with the correct account.
setup.distinctGoogleAccountsHint: Use 3 distinct Google accounts for distributed recovery

initiate.walletNotFoundMessage: The wallet address has not been restored yet. Go back to sign-in, tap Recover your wallet, then authenticate with the same social account first.
initiate.deployedWalletNotFoundMessage: No deployed wallet was found for this social account. Try again with the account used to create the wallet.
initiate.walletLookupFailedMessage: Could not verify the deployed wallet. Check your network connection and try again.
initiate.resetPasskeyFailed: Passkey reset failed. Please try again.

funding.title: Fund with Base Sepolia ETH
funding.description: This reference app has no paymaster, so this address needs testnet ETH before wallet deployment.
funding.zeroBalance: No balance yet. Get Base Sepolia ETH from the faucet, then check again.
funding.funded: Balance confirmed. You can continue wallet deployment.
funding.missingAddress: Funding address not found. Please sign in again.

chain.title: Select Network
chain.description: Choose a network to activate your wallet

creating.title: Creating Wallet...
creating.description: Creating a secure wallet with your passkey and recovery accounts
creating.downloadDescription: Wallet creation requires a one-time proving file download of about {{size}}MB. The files are cached on this device after download.
creating.downloadWifiNotice: Wi-Fi is recommended. Keep the app open while the download is in progress.
creating.downloadOfflineNotice: Internet connection is required. Connect to a network, then check again.

complete.title: Wallet Activated!
complete.description: Your wallet is ready to use on {{chain}}

errors.passkeyNotFound: Passkey not found. Please register again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.creationFailed: Wallet creation failed. Please try again.
errors.insufficientBalance: Insufficient Base Sepolia ETH. Fund the wallet address with testnet ETH, then try again.
errors.bundlerError: Transaction failed. Please try again later.
errors.platformUnsupported: Wallet activation is currently only available on Android. iOS support coming soon.

masterKeySigning.title: Identity Verification
masterKeySigning.subtitle: Sign in with your recovery accounts
masterKeySigning.pickSubtitle: Select your recovery accounts in order to verify your identity
masterKeySigning.statusWaitingUser: Please sign in with this account
masterKeySigning.accountGuidance: If multiple accounts appear, select the one shown above
masterKeySigning.errorAccountMismatch: Wrong account selected. Please try again with {{expected}}.
masterKeySigning.errorRetryNote: Retrying requires re-authenticating all accounts from the beginning.
masterKeySigning.proofSecure: 🔒 Building the proof right on your device (this can take tens of seconds)

proofMode.title: Proof Generation Mode
proofMode.subtitle: Choose how to generate ZK proofs
proofMode.nativeDescription:
Generate directly on device (~60s)
Requires one-time key download
proofMode.downloadDescription:
On-device proof requires proving files (~700MB).
Files will be downloaded automatically when needed.
proofMode.prepareDownloadDescription: This action requires the {{circuit}} proving files. About {{size}}MB will be downloaded and cached on this device.
proofMode.prepareWifiNotice: Wi-Fi is recommended. Keep the app open while the download is in progress.
proofMode.prepareMobileNotice: Mobile data charges may apply. Wi-Fi is recommended.
proofMode.prepareOfflineNotice: Internet connection is required. Connect to a network, then check again.
proofMode.downloadFailed: Key download failed. Please try again.
proofMode.settingsHint: You can change this later in Settings
proofMode.insufficientMemory: Not available on this device (requires more than 4GB RAM)
proofMode.savedNotice: You can change the proof generation mode anytime in Settings.
proofMode.delete1of1KeyMessage: The cached 1-of-1 proving key will be deleted. It will be re-downloaded when you create a wallet.
proofMode.delete3of3KeyMessage: The cached 3-of-3 proving key will be deleted. It will be re-downloaded when needed.

network.cellularWarningMessage: The proving files are about 700MB. Download using mobile data?
network.offlineError: No internet connection. Please check your WiFi or mobile data.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.

recoveryReentry.title: Recovery Account Re-authentication
recoveryReentry.description: Please re-authenticate at least one recovery account for this wallet.
